en_title: Marvel Studios Boss Kevin Feige Feels Like a 'Gigantic Loser and Failure' Over Doomed Blade Reboot With Mahershala Ali
cn_title: 《刀锋战士》重启流产，凯文·费奇自认「巨大失败者」
subtitle: 七年仍未开机

paragraphs.en: Marvel Studios boss Kevin Feige has said he feels like a “gigantic loser and failure” over the doomed Blade reboot that was meant to star Mahershala Ali.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威影业负责人凯文·费奇表示，由马赫沙拉·阿里主演却陷入困境的《刀锋战士》重启版，让他觉得自己是个「巨大的失败者」。

paragraphs.en: Marvel announced it was making Blade back in 2019, and confirmed that Mahershala Ali would feature as a new version of its vampire hunter, previously played by Wesley Snipes. But, seven years later, the project appears to be dead in the water, despite enthusiasm from Ali and fans to see it eventually.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威早在2019年宣布制作《刀锋战士》，并确认阿里将饰演新版吸血鬼猎人，此前该角色由韦斯利·斯奈普斯扮演。但七年过去，尽管阿里和粉丝仍有热情，项目似乎已陷入停滞。

paragraphs.en: "We've landed on modern day," in an interview last summer, acknowledging that Blade's script had gone through "three or four" different incarnations, two of which were period pieces. "We didn't feel like, as we often do, you can have a good script and make it a great script through production," Feige continued, discussing why the project had been pushed back. "We didn't feel confident that we could do that on Blade, and we didn't want to do that to Mahershala and didn't want to do that to us."
paragraphs.cn: 费奇去年夏天表示：「我们最终决定采用现代背景。」他承认剧本经历了「三到四个」版本，其中两个是年代戏。他解释延期原因：「有时剧本不错，我们能在制作中把它变得出色；但我们对《刀锋战士》没有这种信心，也不想这样对待马赫沙拉或我们自己。」

paragraphs.en: In December, Mia Goth said she got a wig to wear for the 1920s Blade movie idea , before the setting was scrapped and the project was placed on hiatus.
paragraphs.cn: 去年12月，Mia Goth透露自己曾为1920年代背景的版本准备假发，后来该设定被取消，项目也暂停。

paragraphs.en: "The furthest that it got with me was... I flew to Atlanta and did a chemistry test with Mahershala," Goth said, speaking on the Josh Horowitz podcast. "I did a costume fitting and a wig fitting. I was very excited in the direction it was going and Mahershala had such an interesting take on it, he was great. And it just unravelled from there, unfortunately."
paragraphs.cn: Goth在Josh Horowitz播客中说：「进展最远时，我飞到亚特兰大与马赫沙拉做化学反应测试，也试了服装和假发。我非常期待那个方向，马赫沙拉的构想很有趣，他很棒。可惜之后一切就散了。」

paragraphs.en: Alongside Mia Goth's wig, fans know that a full wardrobe of clothes was made for the film's supporting artists, which were ultimately sold on . Bizarrely, these ended up being used in another period vampire movie, Ryan Coogler's acclaimed Sinners .
paragraphs.cn: 除Goth的假发外，影片还为群演制作了整套服装，最终被出售。离奇的是，这些服装后来用在Ryan Coogler广受好评的年代吸血鬼电影《罪人》中。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, Wesley Snipes reprised his role for a cameo in Deadpool & Wolverine. Deadpool actor Ryan Reynolds has said he wants Snipes' classic Marvel movie hero to get a send-off film akin to Hugh Jackman's Logan .
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，韦斯利·斯奈普斯在《死侍与金刚狼》中客串回归。瑞安·雷诺兹表示，希望斯奈普斯的经典漫威英雄能获得一部类似休·杰克曼《金刚狼3》的告别电影。

paragraphs.en: Now, with Avengers: Doomsday half a year away and Blade nowhere in sight, Feige has spoken about his feelings on the failed project.
paragraphs.cn: 如今距离《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》只剩半年，《刀锋战士》仍不见踪影，费奇谈到了自己对失败项目的感受。

paragraphs.en: “Shall we get into a therapy session?” he replied when asked about it by Josh Horowitz . “I’m feeling very excited that we got Wesley back for a time in Deadpool & Wolverine, and like a gigantic loser and failure that we didn’t get off the ground with Merhashala.”
paragraphs.cn: 被Josh Horowitz问及时，他回答：「要开始心理治疗环节吗？我很高兴我们能让韦斯利在《死侍与金刚狼》中短暂回归，但没能和马赫沙拉把项目启动起来，让我觉得自己是个巨大的失败者。」

paragraphs.en: It’s a frank admission from Feige that Blade has been something of a disaster. In 2024, Snipes poked fun at the MIA film after news surfaced that director Yann Demange had reportedly exited the project. "Blade, lordylordylordy folks still lookin for the secret sauce, ridin snowmobiles in traffic, kinda rough," Snipes said. "Daywalkers make it look easy, don't they?"
paragraphs.cn: 这是费奇坦率承认《刀锋战士》近乎灾难。2024年，导演Yann Demange据报退出后，斯奈普斯还嘲讽这部失踪影片：「天哪，大家还在找秘方，在车流里骑雪地摩托，挺难的。日行者看起来很轻松，对吧？」

paragraphs.en: And in May last year, David S. Goyer, who wrote all three movies in the original Blade trilogy and even directed 2004’s Blade: Trinity, wondered what was taking so long .
paragraphs.cn: 去年5月，为原版三部曲编剧并执导2004年《刀锋战士3》的David S. Goyer也疑惑为何拖了这么久。

paragraphs.en: “I would,” Goyer responded when asked if he’d write Marvel’s Blade reboot. “I’ve always loved the character and I love him. I’ve been sitting on the sidelines wondering, ‘What in the world is going on? Why is it taking so long?’ Because I’m a huge Marvel fan myself, and I’ve just been totally puzzled.”
paragraphs.cn: 被问是否愿为漫威重启版编剧时，Goyer回答：「我愿意。我一直喜欢这个角色，也喜欢他。我一直在旁边想：到底怎么回事？为什么这么久？我自己就是漫威铁粉，完全想不通。」

paragraphs.en: There is similar uncertainty over the Marvel’s Blade video game, which is in development at Microsoft-owned studio, Arkane Lyon. Arkane Lyon is among a number of studios set to leave Microsoft ownership as part of sweeping layoffs across Xbox.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威《刀锋战士》游戏也存在类似不确定性。该作由微软旗下Arkane Lyon开发，而在XBOX大裁员中，Arkane Lyon属于将脱离微软的工作室之一。

opus_summary: 漫威2019年公布由马赫沙拉·阿里主演的《刀锋战士》重启版，七年后项目仍近乎停摆。凯文·费奇坦言自己像「巨大失败者」，剧本多次改写、演员试装后仍未开拍。
